summary: Static verification of SIGMA Docker configuration files (bug: user reported '.env.example tidak ada'). Created pytest suite with 51 checks covering both env templates (dotless + dotfile), docker-compose.yaml validity/services/volume/network, backend & frontend Dockerfiles, nginx.conf reverse-proxy, and .dockerignore files. All 51 tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: env.example and .env.example are BYTE-IDENTICAL (good) - keep them in sync going forward or consider making .env.example a symlink to env.example to avoid drift.
docker-compose.yaml Usage comment correctly references `cp env.example .env` (dotless), aligning with the visible file the user should copy.
JWT_SECRET uses `${JWT_SECRET:?JWT_SECRET must be set}` (fail-fast) in compose - good practice for a security-critical variable.
Backend Dockerfile runs as non-root user `sigma` - good.
Frontend Dockerfile uses multi-stage (node:20-alpine builder -> nginx:1.27-alpine runtime) with correct ARG REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL baked at build time - correct pattern for CRA.
nginx.conf reverse-proxies /api/ to upstream backend:8001 with keepalive and 120s timeouts - suitable for long-running requests (PDF/QR generation).
Minor: .dockerignore files exclude *.md; if README is needed inside image (unlikely) revisit. Otherwise fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Docker engine is NOT available in this sandbox. All tests are static file checks via pytest. To rerun: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_docker_config.py -v`. The primary bugfix (user complained '.env.example tidak ada') is verified - /app/env.example exists (1379 bytes, non-hidden, visible in file explorers).
rca of the issue: USER BUG: '.env.example tidak ada'. RCA: .env.example is a dotfile and is hidden by default in many file explorers/UIs, so the user could not see it even though it existed. MITIGATION (already applied by main agent): a dotless copy /app/env.example was added (identical content) so it's always visible. docker-compose.yaml Usage comment updated to instruct `cp env.example .env`. Both files are byte-identical. VERIFIED: /app/env.example exists (1379 bytes) and contains all 10 required variables.
